params.name: Anna Karenina
params.description: Anna Karenina is divided into eight volumes, telling the tragic story of the noblewoman Anna Karenina and Vronsky against the backdrop of 19th-century Russian society, as well as the landowner Levin's pursuit of the meaning of life and ideals. Anna suffers from the social pressure of public opinion due to her extramarital affair and eventually walks into the abyss of despair. Tolstoy also further cemented his reputation as a world-class writer with this work. The novel has won widespread acclaim …
